Tail Plant.canonical_display_pose: Short skateboard tail planted on the ground with the long nose raised diagonally; only the front toe/front third of the raised shoe presses the short tail behind the rear truck while the heel and most of the shoe overhang; other shoe stays flat on the ground.
required_checks: front toe or front third of raised shoe behind rear truck
heel and most of raised shoe visibly overhang tail
toe visibly contacts tail with no air gap

Pop-Up Ready.canonical_display_pose: Surfer and surfboard travel on one shared axis; the narrow pointed nose is forward and the broad tail, traction pad, and fins are rearward; both feet are supported by the deck, with the rear foot over the tail pad and front foot toward the nose.
required_checks: tail pad and fins at rear
regular stance means anatomical left foot forward
goofy stance means anatomical right foot forward
hips and shoulders aligned with board travel
athlete and board face the same direction
no mirrored rider opposing board travel

Binding Check.canonical_display_pose: Snowboard lies flat while the athlete crouches beside it with both boots outside the bindings and both hands checking the nearest binding; no crossed leg and no boot entering the opposite-side binding.
